added.description: While in search of an identity, Jeff starts hanging out with Stan's favorite celebrity chef. Klaus gets an exciting new outfit.
added.title: Flavortown

added.description: Francine falls in with a group of tough girls after becoming the new school guidance counselor. Jeff panics when he loses his hat.
added.title: Mean Francine

added.description: Stan avoids giving Steve "the talk" by joining a chastity group. The Smiths build a waterslide in the backyard.
added.title: My Purity Ball and Chain

added.description: Klaus leaves the family after one too many harassments. 15 years later, they reconnect for his funeral.
added.title: No Weddings and a Funeral

added.description: After her family accuses her of being a quitter, Francine becomes a bodybuilder. Klaus claims to have invented the high five.
added.title: One-Woman Swole

added.description: Roger becomes worried about outliving the family. Klaus opens a convenience store in the attic.
added.title: OreTron Trail

added.description: In American Dad's 250th episode, Roger has a medical emergency and Stan has to take over his personas.
added.title: Persona Assistant

added.description: Stan gets in over his head when he runs for mayor.
added.title: Railroaded

added.description: Roger turns his attention to Steve's friend Snot who teaches him about Hanukkah, prompting him to convert to Judaism. Roger then decides to make Hanukkah more popular than Christmas by stealing Santa's powers, and becoming Schmanta Claus.
added.title: Santa, Schmanta

added.description: The family visits Possum Lake. Roger learns to ride a bike.
added.title: The Legend of Old Ulysses

added.description: Stan finds an outlet for his boring stories while teaching young CIA cadets. Klaus becomes a hype man for a rapper.
added.title: The Never-Ending Stories

added.description: Bob competes in a Bachelor-style competition to inherit Mr. Fischoeder's 100-year-old giant tortoise.
added.title: The Shell Game

added.description: When a pathetic shrimp calls the Smiling Friends hotline after being dumped, Shrimpina, Pim and Charlie have very different ideas about how to handle the situation. The audience finally votes on the cool new fifth Smiling Friend, Smormu.
added.title: Shrimp's Odyssey

removed.description: When Louise signs up for a father-daughter boogie board contest, Bob's past comes back to haunt him.
removed.title: Boogie Days

removed.description: Hayley witnesses harsh working conditions at the CIA and encourages action.
removed.title: (You Gotta) Strike for Your Right

removed.description: Francine's dinner party goes awry when the mysterious Dinner Party Killer threatens it and the family.
removed.title: Death by Dinner Party

removed.description: Stan deals with childhood issues of abandonment. Klaus starts a website to embarrass the Smith family about their fails.
removed.title: Klaustastrophe.tv

removed.description: Roger breaks up Steve's friendship with Snot, Barry & Toshi. Jeff realizes he has a flair for house flipping and gets Stan, Francine and Hayley involved.
removed.title: Lost Boys

removed.description: Roger becomes a marionette and injures other students to help Steve win the school talent show. Stan, Hayley and Klaus start their own local honey business.
removed.title: The Talented Mr. Dingleberry

removed.description: Hayley becomes a town outcast after Stan ruins a town mural. Steve attends clown school.
removed.title: The Mural of the Story

removed.description: Stan and Steve open up their own father-son garbage business after Stan inherits his father's old truck. Roger finds Hayley is a natural at bumper pool and brings her to play with the best player in town.
removed.title: Garbage Stan

removed.description: Hayley and Stan compete while collecting data for the US Census. Klaus inherits a camera and has Steve and his friends model for him.
removed.title: The Census of the Lambs

removed.description: Steve sets out to stop Roger after he joins a mysterious order. Francine buys a new pasta sauce and the family starts changing.
removed.title: Shell Game

removed.description: Francine becomes a conspiracy theorist. Klaus & Steve help Snot pimp out his new room.
removed.title: Paranoid_Frandroid

removed.description: In an American Dad western, Stan is a wanted man hunted by Roger the bounty hunter. He ends up in a town in need of a good guy and helps Principal Lewis, Francine, Steve, and Hayley.
removed.title: West to Mexico

removed.description: While Zou's secrets unravel, a shadow looms over Sanji's fate.

input: The Delinquent Comes Home! Emperor Big Mom's Assassins!
